title: Erling Haaland ready to lead Norway's charge at WC 2026
summary: Norway's star striker Erling Haaland says he has never felt more prepared heading into a World Cup. 'This is our moment,' Haaland told reporters at a pre-tournament press conference.

title: France name final 26-man squad for World Cup
summary: Didier Deschamps has confirmed France's squad for the 2026 World Cup, featuring Kylian Mbappé as captain. Several surprise inclusions and notable absences have sparked debate among fans.

title: Brazil unveil new kit ahead of North American adventure
summary: The Seleção have revealed their iconic yellow home and blue away kits for the 2026 World Cup. Manager Carlos Ancelotti described the squad as 'the most balanced in years'.

title: Host nation USA confident of deep run
summary: The USMNT have shown impressive form in warm-up friendlies, defeating Germany 2-1 in their final pre-tournament test. Coach Gregg Berhalter says the squad is 'peaking at the right time'.

title: Argentina seek to defend their crown
summary: Lionel Scaloni's Argentina arrive as defending champions, with Lionel Messi expected to play his final World Cup. The squad looks sharp after a perfect qualification campaign.

title: England's golden generation faces ultimate test
summary: With a squad boasting depth across every position, many pundits are tipping England as dark horses for the trophy. Manager Gareth Southgate is cautiously optimistic.

title: Germany rebuilding with exciting young talent
summary: After a disappointing 2022 exit, Germany have rebuilt around a core of Bundesliga youngsters. Florian Wirtz and Jamal Musiala are expected to be the creative heartbeat of the side.

title: Morocco set to cause more upsets
summary: After their historic 2022 semi-final run, Morocco are back and even better. With a settled squad and experienced manager, the Atlas Lions are everyone's pick for a deep tournament run.
